content: We can reframe the task-agnostic Self-Refine framework as a general structural backbone for instantiating multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, where each iteration of Self-Refine’s self-feedback loop leverages a different inconsistent solving perspective from the LLM itself to drive refinement. This creates a completely training-free, self-contained self-reflection system that does not require external data, extra fine-tuning, or hand-crafted test cases.
